detail: Remote TLS handshake failed; local master and origin/master both pointed to c43fe37d058555031707cf354c4b76a71e3496e1.
196 candidates, 0 reviewed, 0 frozen. No reviewer identities were fabricated and no candidates were automatically accepted.
10-row candidate-only stdio smoke produced 7 validation_error, 2 non_empty, and 1 empty; all 10 recommended argument objects were preserved exactly.
Initial 30-second normal-request smoke produced 2/3 success and one terminated timeout. A 60-second-budget rerun produced 3/3 success; timeout was never counted as success.
Passing pytest processes emitted a Windows PermissionError while cleaning the pytest-current temporary symlink; all recorded test exit codes were 0.
Not run because frozen audited Ground Truth is empty and this round must not announce the production-pilot threshold.
No OCR provider implementation or enabled production OCR path exists in the repository.
